title: Dios Nunca Muere
overview: A teenage couple desperate for true romance.Lucía is a bored girl with a father that mistreats her.Fernando is her boyfriend in search of a heroic attempt.She tells him about her father,he lays the plan:they murder him and flee to the mountains of Andorra.
